overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, beginning in a neon-lit elevated walkway, overlooking busy street traffic from above, and descending to a rain-slicked street level surrounded by towering digital billboards. The footage features vivid cyan and magenta neon lighting with reflective wet surfaces characteristic of high-end game engine rendering.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by vivid cyan neon strips overhead. A burrito shop and vending machines line the right side while the camera moves forward through the enclosed corridor.

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens to reveal a view of a busy multi-lane street below. Vehicles move along the road while a large green industrial building dominates the left side. The camera continues along the elevated path overlooking the traffic.

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues with a distinctive colorful glass ceiling that creates rainbow lighting effects. Various neon advertisements line the walls as the camera moves through the covered corridor away from the street view.

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens up as the camera approaches street level, revealing towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards. The transition from enclosed walkway to open urban space becomes apparent as the sky becomes visible between structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with towering digital advertisements

events.description: pavement becomes wet and highly reflective, indicating recent rain

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto a wet city street at ground level, surrounded by massive towers covered in digital billboards. The reflective wet pavement mirrors the vibrant neon lights while sparse traffic and pedestrians move through the open urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit pedestrian corridor that gradually descends and opens into a vast, rain-slicked cyberpunk plaza. It begins within a covered walkway illuminated by cyan neon strips, passing a burrito shop and vending machines before the path opens to reveal a busy multi-lane street and a large green industrial building below. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts back into an enclosed corridor under a colorful glass ceiling that casts rainbow lighting effects across various neon advertisements. The scene then expands as the camera approaches street level, transitioning from the narrow walkway to an open urban space where the sky becomes visible between towering structures. Finally, the camera emerges onto a wet city street at ground level, where massive digital billboards loom overhead and the reflective pavement mirrors the vibrant neon glow of the surrounding metropolis.
